attacks.name: Wrap
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Hypnotic Gaze
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your deck.

attacks.name: Healing Melody
attacks.effect: Heal 10 damage from each of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hurricane Tail
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 60 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Knock Away
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

abilities.name: Scornful Storm
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may have your opponent discard cards from his or her hand until he or she has 4 cards left in his or her hand.

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Energy Assist
attacks.effect: Attach a basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sky Heal
attacks.effect: If Latios is on your Bench, heal 20 damage from this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Sky Blade
attacks.effect: If Latias is on your Bench, this attack does 20 more damage.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top 2 cards of your deck.

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Signs of Evolution
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for Fraxure, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

abilities.name: Grit
abilities.effect: If this Pokémon is affected by a Special Condition, each of its attacks does 40 more damage (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Axe Slugger
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is a Colorless Pokémon, this attack does 60 more damage.

attacks.name: Dragon Pulse
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your deck.

attacks.name: Tight Jaw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Dragon Tail
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 80 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
